notes: Palworld 1.0 data extracted from palworld.gg (bundled game database, breeding algorithm mirrored from the site's own calculator: nearest combiRank to floor((a+b+1)/2), ties to higher combiPriority, unique combos with optional gender locks, uniqueOnly pals excluded from the generic pool).

pals.name: Lamball
pals.description:
A walk up a hill tends to end with this Pal tumbling back down.
This causes it to become dizzy and unable to move, 
making it easy to capture and kill.
As a result, this Pal has tumbled down to the very bottom 
of the food chain itself.

partnerSkill.name: Fluffy Shield
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
equips to the player and becomes a shield.

Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

actives.name: Roly Poly
actives.desc: Lamball's exclusive skill.  Curls into a ball, rolling after any enemies in its way.  Becomes dizzy and unable to move after the attack ends.

actives.name: Air Cannon
actives.desc: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

actives.name: Power Shot
actives.desc: Charges energy into a focused blast.

actives.name: Implode
actives.desc: Risks its life to cause a violent explosion. Becomes incapacitated afterwards.

actives.name: Electric Ball
actives.desc: Fires an electric ball that slowly pursues an enemy.

actives.name: Power Bomb
actives.desc: Charges a massive amount of energy before firing a large destructive ball.

actives.name: Pal Blast
actives.desc: Charges destructive energy before firing a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.

actives.name: Holy Burst
actives.desc: Creates a wide explosion of light at the enemy's location and around it.

pals.name: Cattiva
pals.description:
At a glance it appears full of confidence, but it is in fact weak and cowardly.
Being toyed with by a Cattiva
is in many ways the greatest of disgraces.

partnerSkill.name: Cat Helper
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity by 100~200.
(Does not stack)

actives.name: Punch Flurry
actives.desc: Cattiva's exclusive skill. Chases after enemies, swinging both arms  and delivering a flurry of punches.

actives.name: Air Cannon
actives.desc: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

actives.name: Bog Blast
actives.desc: Hurls sticky mud at an enemy.

actives.name: Power Shot
actives.desc: Charges energy into a focused blast.

actives.name: Wind Cutter
actives.desc: Fires a high speed blade of wind that flies straight at an enemy.

actives.name: Seed Machine Gun
actives.desc: Fires a volley of hard seeds at enemies in front of it.

actives.name: Pal Blast
actives.desc: Charges destructive energy before firing a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.

actives.name: Holy Burst
actives.desc: Creates a wide explosion of light at the enemy's location and around it.

pals.name: Chikipi
pals.description:
Extremely weak and far too delicious.
It is one of the weakest Pals alongside Lamball.
No matter how many are hunted, they just keep appearing.

partnerSkill.name: Egg Layer
partnerSkill.desc: Sometimes lays an Egg when assigned to Ranch.

actives.name: Chicken Rush
actives.desc: Chikipi's exclusive skill.  Flies at enemies in its sights, attacking them with its sharp beak.

pals.name: Lifmunk
pals.description:
Intelligent as a five to seven-year-old human child. 
It makes a wonderful partner, but there have been more than a few cases 
where they've killed their master after learning to use weapons.

partnerSkill.name: Lifmunk Recoil
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
leaps onto the player's head and uses a submachine gun to follows up player attacks.

actives.name: Wind Cutter
actives.desc: Fires a high speed blade of wind that flies straight at an enemy.

actives.desc: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

actives.desc: Charges energy into a focused blast.

actives.desc: Generates spiny thorns that chase an enemy along the ground, piercing them from below.

actives.name: Solar Blast

actives.name: Wind Burst

pals.name: Fuack
pals.description:
Using its own body water, this Pal can create waves anywhere. 
It body surfs when in a hurry, but the resulting speed often ends 
in a fatal collision.

partnerSkill.name: Surfing Slam
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
Fuack body surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

actives.name: Aqua Gun
actives.desc: Hurls a ball of water straight at an enemy.

actives.name: Power Shot
actives.desc: Charges energy into a focused blast.

actives.name: Hydro Jet
actives.desc: Hurls a high speed ball of water at an enemy.

actives.name: Ice Missile
actives.desc: Creates ice lances in the air that fly towards enemies.

actives.name: Bubble Blast
actives.desc: Fires numerous bubbles that slowly pursue an enemy.

actives.name: Aqua Burst
actives.desc: Creates a giant ball of water and hurls it at an enemy.

actives.name: Hydro Laser
actives.desc: Shoots pressurized water at extreme velocities, sweeping over a wide area in front of it.

actives.name: Geyser Gush
actives.desc: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.

pals.name: Fuack Ignis
pals.description:
With a belly built for friction, this Pal sparks flames as it body surfs.
But when it gets carried away, it often ends up a rolling fireball.

partnerSkill.name: Fire Tackle
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
Fuack Ignis fire surfs towards an enemy and slams into them.

actives.name: Ignis Blast
actives.desc: Hurls a ball of fire  straight at an enemy.

actives.name: Spirit Fire
actives.desc: Shoots fireballs towards an enemy.  The fireballs explode after a short distance,  generating smaller fireballs that spread forward.

actives.name: Bubble Blast
actives.desc: Fires numerous bubbles that slowly pursue an enemy.

actives.name: Ignis Breath
actives.desc: Shoots flames at an enemy, dealing continuous damage.

actives.name: Flame Wall
actives.desc: Creates a wall of flames at the enemy's location. The wall of flames will remain for a while, and deal damage to the enemies it touches.

actives.name: Hydro Slicer
actives.desc: Mows down the frontal area with a blast of compressed water. The area struck by the blast erupts with water after a short delay.

actives.name: Volcanic Rain
actives.desc: Fires countless volcanic bombs into the sky. After a while, the bombs rain down around their originator.

actives.name: Fire Ball
actives.desc: Creates a giant ball of flame and hurls it at an enemy. The ball explodes over a wide area upon impact.

pals.name: Vixy
pals.description:
The idol of Palpagos Island.
If you bully a Vixy,
you best be prepared to become enemies with the whole world.

partnerSkill.name: Dig Here!
partnerSkill.desc:
Sometimes digs up items from the ground
when assigned to Ranch.

pals.name: Celaray
pals.description:
Riding the wind, this Pal travels where it pleases. 
Should it find a partner along the way, 
the encounter will mark its journey's end.

partnerSkill.name: Zephyr Glider
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
modifies the performance of the equipped glider.

Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

pals.name: Celaray Lux
pals.description:
Its flashy patterns help it attract a partner.
But after a long history of electrocution incidents involving Celaray Lux,
yellow-and-black stripes are now seen across the island as a sign of danger.

partnerSkill.name: Jolt Glider
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
modifies the performance of the equipped glider.

Prevents fall damage and extends the duration of high-speed gliding.

actives.desc: Fires a high-speed lightning spear straight ahead towards the enemy.

pals.name: Cremis
pals.description:
Compared to Lamball, it has finer wool
and a temperament more suited for domestication.
However, it has historically always been kept as a pet.
Cuteness is considered a virtue.

partnerSkill.name: Fluffy Wool
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
increases Attack of [elem:Normal]Neutral Pals by 15~30%. (Does not stack)

Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to Ranch.

pals.name: Croajiro
pals.description:
Those who disgrace the honor of the herd are forced to take their own life.
By piercing their inflated vocal sac with a tree branch,
they are blown away into the atmosphere and return to the afterlife.

partnerSkill.name: Leap Stance
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

While airborne before landing,
the player's Attack is increased by 50~86%.

actives.name: Aqua Gun
actives.desc: Hurls a ball of water straight at an enemy.

actives.name: Bubble Blast
actives.desc: Fires numerous bubbles that slowly pursue an enemy.

actives.desc: Creates a giant ball of water and hurls it at an enemy.

actives.name: Geyser Gush
actives.desc: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.

pals.name: Croajiro Noct
pals.description:
The Croajiro who have forsaken their honor gather and form splinter groups.
They will use any underhanded means to take down their chosen prey.
If you encounter a pack of Croajiro Noct in the dead of the night, 
it's your life that's on the line.

partnerSkill.name: Shadow Stance
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
Croajiro Noct channels its loyalty and puffs up its abdomen to store energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

While in party,
improves player's and Pals' [elem:Dark]Dark damage to enemy weak points by 25~40%. (Does not stack)

actives.desc: Fires off dark energy that homes in on an enemy.

pals.name: Herbil
pals.description:
When in doubt, punch it till it works—that’s Herbil's approach to fixing things.
With strength perfectly tuned for humans, sometimes just one punch is enough to restart a stopped heart.

partnerSkill.name: Herbil Pulse
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
Herbil uses its healing powers to restore 30~60% of the player's Max Health when incapacitated.

actives.desc: Herbil's exclusive skill. After a brief moment of preparation, charges at the enemy at high speed, finishing with a flip.

actives.desc: Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly. Can ricochet up to four times.

pals.name: Teafant
pals.description:
Large amounts of water pour from what is thought to be its nose,
though some say that it is, in fact, just snot.
This has sparked a fierce debate among Pal scholars.

partnerSkill.name: Soothing Shower
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
restores 20~40% of the player's Health when Health falls below 30%. (Does not stack)
(120-second cooldown after activation)

pals.name: Gumoss
pals.description:
A strange Pal with a body resembling tree sap. 
It gradually loses strength if it has nothing to cover 
its body with, eventually rotting away.

partnerSkill.name: Logging Assistance
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
improves logging efficiency by 30~50% and reduces weight of all types of wood by 40~60%. (Does not stack)

pals.name: Pupperai
pals.description:
Pupperai territorial disputes begin with a staredown 
and end in a single, quick strike. 
Training them to |stay| is risky business, 
as the |go| command triggers that same attack instinct.

partnerSkill.name: Best Boy
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
increases the player's melee weapon damage by 10~35%. (Does not stack)

actives.name: Double Fang (Ground)
actives.desc: Bites rapidly in succession to attack enemies.

actives.name: Fierce Fang (Ground)
actives.desc: Quickly lunges at the enemy and bites to deal damage.

actives.name: Stone Blast
actives.desc: Fires a barrage of stones forward.

actives.name: Persistent Slash
actives.desc: Pupperai's exclusive skill. Charges at full speed, delivering two consecutive slashes with the wooden stick held in its mouth.

actives.name: Stone Cannon
actives.desc: Digs up a boulder and hurls it at an enemy.

actives.name: Sand Tornado
actives.desc: Generates two sand tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.

actives.desc: Generates a sharp rock spear under an enemy.

actives.name: Sand Twister
actives.desc: Creates multiple sand tornadoes. The tornadoes continuously spin in circles.

actives.name: Rocky Impact
actives.desc: Shakes the ground and lifts a massive boulder into the air.

pals.name: Clovee
pals.description:
Some individuals once had three or more leaves on their foreheads.
Regarded as symbols of good fortune, 
those with more leaves were heavily hunted, 
leading the species to evolve fewer leaves over time.

partnerSkill.name: Happy Clover
partnerSkill.desc:
While at a base,
increases the Gathering Work Suitability Level for all other Base Pals by +1.
(Does not stack)

pals.name: Jolthog
pals.description:
It releases the electricity stored in its body when under attack.
The voltage it generates exceeds 10 million volts,
making it more lethal than any conventional heavy firearms when thrown.

partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
equips Jolthog to the player to be thrown at an enemy, causing an [elem:Electricity]Electric explosion upon impact.

pals.description:
It releases the cold air stored in its body when under attack. 
The frigid blast it radiates is cold enough to freeze the surrounding air 
and easily pierces through any attacker's body.

pals.name: Depresso
pals.description:
It has few friends because of the perpetually grouchy look on its face,
but it is in fact kindhearted.
Some have seen it feeding Vixy who have strayed from their pack.

partnerSkill.name: Caffeine Inoculation
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
Depresso chugs an entire energy drink, increasing its Movement Speed and Work Speed by 100~900%.

Sometimes drops Venom Gland when assigned to Ranch.

pals.name: Pengullet
pals.description:
The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared,
but sadly, its desire to fly has remained as strong as ever.
Even now, it tries to fly again in any way it can.

partnerSkill.name: Pengullet Launcher
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
the player equips a Rocket Launcher to fire Pengullet as ammunition.

Pengullet explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

pals.name: Pengullet Lux
pals.description:
The feathers of this Pal have all but disappeared, and it can no longer fly.
Yet its longing for the sky has turned to jealousy—
so it harnessed electricity to strike down those who still soar.

partnerSkill.name: Pengullet Lux Launcher
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
the player equips Pengullet Lux to fire Rocket Launcher as ammunition.

Pengullet Lux explodes on impact and is incapacitated.

However, since this Pal gets pampered as it pleases,

After coming into contact with humans, however,

It used to be considered an emissary of the Thunder God, 
and thus was not hunted by people.
However, after witnesses observed one die from a lightning strike,
its reverence faded, and it quite literally fell into the role of a workhorse.

It looks like something is peeking out from inside a costume,

pals.name: Leafan
pals.description:
To hone the martial art passed down through a single bloodline:
Daily training is the only way!

Being distracted by romance? Unthinkable!
Daily discipline is the only way!

The time has come! Shoot my shot!
Instant rejection, that’s all there is!

The techniques of love were never passed down...
Lingering regret, that’s all there is!

When Anubis claimed that mantle, wealthy elites looking for a replacement beguiled the species with wine.
Before long, Sekhmet became a symbol of high nobility.

actives.name: Dark Laser
actives.desc: Charges dark energy before blasting enemies with a powerful beam.

actives.desc: Shadowbeak's exclusive skill.  As it charges forward, emits countless blue rays that automatically locate and pursue the enemy.

actives.name: Dark Whisp
actives.desc: Fires a menacing ball of dark energy that pursues enemies.

pals.name: Selyne
pals.description:
The object floating behind, resembling the moon,
is said to gradually become more circular with each passing generation.
No one knows what will happen when the moon is full.

partnerSkill.name: Celestial Darkness
partnerSkill.desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.

While mounted,
enhances [elem:Normal]Neutral and [elem:Dark]Dark attacks by 15~30%.

actives.name: Dark Cannon
actives.desc: Hurls an energy ball imbued with dark energy at an enemy.

actives.name: Dark Arrow
actives.desc: Fires off dark energy that homes in on an enemy.

actives.name: Air Blade
actives.desc: Sends out sharp blades of air in a fan shape.

actives.name: Comet Strike
actives.desc: Drops a meteorite straight down, generating a shock wave around the impact area.

actives.name: Holy Burst
actives.desc: Creates a wide explosion of light at the enemy's location and around it.

actives.name: Seigetsu Blade
actives.desc: Selyne's exclusive skill. Fires two consecutive high-speed blades imbued with the power of moonlight.

actives.name: Star Mine
actives.desc: Generates stars around the enemy that explode on contact. Stars also explode after some time.

actives.name: Moonlight Beam
actives.desc: Selyne's exclusive skill. Stores energy in the moon on its back, then fires a crescent-shaped beam forward.

actives.name: Seigetsu Flash
actives.desc: Selyne's exclusive skill. Fires three consecutive high-speed slashes  imbued with the power of moonlight.

pals.name: Bastigor
pals.description:
The sight of anything round gives it an uncontrollable urge to punch it.
For Snow Tiger Beast Man the toughest challenge, after simply living,
is making a snowman.

partnerSkill.name: Blizzard Crash
partnerSkill.desc:
Can be ridden.
While mounted,
delivers crushing blows with a hammer forged from [elem:Ice]Ice.

actives.name: Stone Cannon
actives.desc: Digs up a boulder and hurls it at an enemy.

actives.name: Iceberg
actives.desc: Summons a sharp ice lance under an enemy.

actives.name: Crystal Breath
actives.desc: Enshrouds an enemy in a frigid blast of air, dealing continuous damage.

actives.name: Frost Talon
actives.desc: Bastigor's exclusive skill. Stomps the ground, creating a fissure of ice ahead.  Then, rapidly closes the distance and slashes with the right hand.

actives.name: Rockburst
actives.desc: Causes the ground to shake before hurling a massive stone mass at its surroundings.

actives.name: Rocky Impact
actives.desc: Shakes the ground and lifts a massive boulder into the air.

actives.name: Diamond Rain
actives.desc: Creates numerous lumps of ice that are consecutively dropped on a foe's head.

actives.name: Glacial Impact
actives.desc: Bastigor's exclusive skill. Let out a mighty roar and leap into the air. Then, embed both arms into the ground to create a massive ice crack.  Continue to channel power into the ground, ultimately causing a large explosion of ice energy

actives.name: Double Blizzard Spike
actives.desc: Creates two huge ice blocks and fires them at the enemy one after another. On impact, it also shocks those close by.

pals.name: Shaolong
pals.description:
Its ring is reserved for a special occasion: upon meeting its destined companion, 
the rings are traded, a symbol of their eternal partnership.

partnerSkill.name: Azure Sovereign
partnerSkill.desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.

This Pal's Attack increases by 4~8% for each other [elem:Dragon]Dragon Pal in your party.

actives.name: Aqua Gun
actives.desc: Hurls a ball of water straight at an enemy.

actives.desc: Drops a meteorite straight down, generating a shock wave around the impact area.

actives.desc: Shaolong's exclusive skill. Cloaks the body in water and charges straight forward.

actives.name: Azure Dracoflare
actives.desc: Shaolong's exclusive skill. Breathes Dragon-elemental flames in a sweeping motion, scorching the surrounding area.

actives.name: Celestial Vortex
actives.desc: Shaolong's exclusive skill. Summons a massive vortex reaching into the heavens. The vortex draws in and eliminates all surrounding enemies at once.

actives.name: Meteorain
actives.desc: Drops countless meteorites, generating an array of shock waves.

pals.name: Silvance
pals.description:
Since ancient times, it has remained within the World Tree, continuing its vigil.
What it protects, and for what purpose, Silvance does not know.
After all, the World Tree will tell it everything. 
The spores it commands surely know who the enemy is.

partnerSkill.name: Spore Stalwart
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
when the player attacks an enemy afflicted with Ivy-Covered, the enemy explodes, dealing additional damage equal to 40~60% of the player's attack damage. (Does not stack)

Also grants immunity to the World Tree's Explosive Spores to both the player and their Pals.

actives.name: Air Blade
actives.desc: Sends out sharp blades of air in a fan shape.

actives.name: Reflect Leaf
actives.desc: Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly. Can ricochet up to four times.

actives.name: Blizzard Spike
actives.desc: Creates a giant lump of ice and hurls it at an enemy. It deals damage to those in the surrounding area upon impact.

actives.name: Crosswind
actives.desc: Conjures blades of wind in front of the enemy, converging to deliver a cutting cross attack.

actives.name: Wind Burst
actives.desc: Summons a massive wind vortex around itself and unleashes a powerful attack.

actives.name: Holy Burst
actives.desc: Creates a wide explosion of light at the enemy's location and around it.

actives.name: Giant Spore
actives.desc: Silvance's exclusive skill. Fires a massive tracking spore that pursues enemies.  It explodes on impact, releasing a wide-area blast.

actives.name: Spore Burst
actives.desc: Silvance's exclusive skill. Scatters explosive spores over a wide area,  then triggers a mass explosion after a set period of time.

pals.name: Dandilord
pals.description:
Since ancient times, it has remained within the World Tree, continuing its vigil.
What it protects, and for what purpose, Dandilord does not care.
After all, the World Tree knows everything.
Only the mist it wields can reveal the truth.

partnerSkill.name: Mist Stalwart
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
the player's attacks inflict Poison 2~6.

While in party,
grants the player and party Pals immunity to Poison, and nullifies the effects of toxic gas in the World Tree area.
(Does not stack)

actives.name: Dark Cannon
actives.desc: Hurls an energy ball imbued with dark energy at an enemy.

actives.desc: Launches a deadly seed. If it hits an enemy, the seed explodes.

actives.name: Dark Laser
actives.desc: Charges dark energy before blasting enemies with a powerful beam.

actives.name: Toxic Dance
actives.desc: Dandilord's exclusive skill. Performs a dance while releasing corrosive mist. The mist remains in the area for a limited time.

pals.name: Bellanoir
pals.description:
Without existing, she quietly gazed upon the world.
One day, she was seized with a longing to be seen.
With unbridled lust for vengeance against reality,
thus was born the Eclipsed Siren.

partnerSkill.name: Nightmare Iris
partnerSkill.desc:

attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Ray.

When this Pal uses Nightmare Ray,
it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

actives.name: Dark Cannon
actives.desc: Hurls an energy ball imbued with dark energy at an enemy.

actives.name: Dark Whisp

pals.name: Bellanoir Libero
pals.description:
With her desires set loose, she was soon overwhelmed.
She longed for a self to gaze upon herself. 
And the sisters who gazed, resenting reality, 
were driven into the abyss and, at last, closed their eyes.

attacks targeted enemy with Nightmare Bloom.

it has a x1.1~2.5 damage multiplier.

pals.name: Xenolord
pals.description:
-Destination reached. Priority: Locate entity |Supersonic Dragon|
-Note: Conquest deadline exceeded by <://Error_Code:126DC> years.
-Update: No conquest traces found. Naturalization confirmed. Commence elimination protocol.
-Staff Memo: Refrain from forgetting or consuming critical data!

partnerSkill.name: Meteor Wings

Can be ridden as a flying mount.

damage done by Partner Skills of weapon-wielding Pals increases by 20~50%. (Does not stack)

actives.desc: Fires high-speed dark orbs in a fan shape,  spreading as they travel.

pals.name: Hartalis
pals.description:
The silence is unsettling, yet strangely soothing.
No one else remains. All have been delivered.
O King of Salvation, carry me too into eternal stillness.
-The ancient text cuts off here.

it generates a barrier that blocks all attacks.

Its gleaming form is free of all negative emotions.
However, a glimmer of hatred can still be seen deep within its eyes.

Its darkened form is the embodiment of negative emotions. 
However, a glimmer of compassion can still be seen deep within its eyes.

Guardian deity of Palpagos Island, known as the Winter Caller.
In the past, when a calamity struck the land, it soared into the sky
and sealed away the threat by casting the island into eternal winter.

pals.name: Neptilius
pals.description:
After the sealing of the calamity, a champion from Feybreak emerged. 
It stares out to sea, awaiting one it deems worthy. 
For such encounters are no coincidence—they are fate.

partnerSkill.name: Sentinel of the Great Sea
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
it follows up the player's attacks with [elem:Water]Water spear strikes.

Can be ridden to travel on water.

While mounted,
it can leap high into the air over water.

actives.name: Aqua Gun

actives.desc: Fires numerous bubbles that slowly pursue an enemy.

actives.desc: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.

actives.desc: Neptilius's exclusive skill. Rising slightly, it gathers water at its mouth, then sweeps a high-pressure stream vertically and horizontally three times. Fissures form at the swept locations, erupting with water.

actives.name: Thunderstorm
actives.desc: Generates a huge tornado of lightning that moves slowly towards the enemy.

pals.name: Jetragon
pals.description:
Watches over Palpagos Island from high above.
When calamity returns to the land, the earth will split open, 
and the skies will burn.
It is destined to strike down the calamity in a flash of total destruction.

partnerSkill.name: Aerial Missile

Can rapidly fire a missile launcher while mounted.

pals.description:
The last of its species, keeping its sacred duty close to heart.
Even should its long obligation ever be fulfilled, 
its cries for its mother would only be answered by a solitary echo.

partnerSkill.name: Resonant Guardian
partnerSkill.desc:
Can be ridden as a flying mount.

Only 1 can be summoned to a base.

While at a base,
it constantly patrols the skies and bombards intruders from high above.

actives.desc: Panthalus's exclusive skill. Fires a large cluster of homing bubbles that remain in place upon landing. Bubbles burst and deal damage upon contact or after several seconds.

A shadow of its former self, 
this mysterious Pal descended upon the Palpagos long ago.
Bringing ruin and calamity, it was sealed away for millennia 
until it was ultimately defeated by a certain Pal Tamer

partnerSkill.desc: This Pal's abilities are still being investigated.

[Tides of Terraria] 
A monster from another world, now tameable in this realm.

[Tides of Terraria] 
A monster from another world, now tameable in this realm.

partnerSkill.name: Mad Eye Lunge
partnerSkill.desc:
When activated,
Eye of Cthulhu charges and attacks targeted enemy.

actives.name: Lock-On Lunge
actives.desc: Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill.  Repeatedly charges at the enemy.

actives.name: Servant Call
actives.desc: Eye of Cthulhu's exclusive skill.  Summons four Servants that charge at enemies to deal damage.  Servants disappear after taking damage or after a short time.

pals.name: Green Slime
pals.description:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A monster from another world, now tameable in this realm.

partnerSkill.name: Slime Body
partnerSkill.desc:
Can be ridden.
Can jump high into the air while mounted.

actives.name: Slime Press (Grass)
actives.desc: Green Slime's exclusive skill.  Leaps toward the enemy and delivers an attack.

pals.name: Illuminant Bat
pals.description:
[Tides of Terraria] 
A monster from another world, now tameable in this realm.

partnerSkill.name: Bat Backup
partnerSkill.desc:
While in party,
appears near the player.

Automatically picks up nearby items.

actives.name: Winged Assault
actives.desc: Cave Bat's exclusive skill.  Using its whole body, it lunges at the enemy, bouncing off the ground or walls on impact.
